pages.title: Server
pages.text: A portable computing unit that houses up to 9 $(l:logicore:components/processor_units)Processor Units$() in a hot-swappable chassis.$(br)$(br)Servers are the primary processing modules for the $(l:logicore:machines/server_rack)Server Rack$(), allowing dense CPU configurations in a compact form.

pages.title: Configuration
pages.text: Right-click the Server in your hand to open its configuration panel. Insert Processor Units (CPUs) into the 9 available slots to populate the server.$(br)$(br)The Server's tooltip will display a breakdown of installed CPUs by tier and the total $(l:logicore:architecture/cycles)Cycle$() generation rate.

pages.title: Usage
pages.text: Once populated with CPUs, insert the Server into a $(l:logicore:machines/server_rack)Server Rack$() by right-clicking the rack while holding the Server.$(br)$(br)Servers can be removed via the Server Rack's GUI. Each Server accepts all three CPU tiers: Basic, Advance, and Ultimate.
A hot-swappable blade chassis for high-density processor deployment.
